query: Review my Node app for security issues.
expected_behavior: Identifies the stack and scopes the review
Walks the vuln categories (injection, XSS, access control, SSRF, crypto, secrets) with per-language signals
Emits findings[] with area:security, SEC-*/OWASP-A0* ruleId, file:line, message, suggestion
Sets [GATE] when any critical/high finding exists

query: Does this Python endpoint have SQL injection? It builds a query with an f-string.
expected_behavior: Traces the f-string user input into cursor.execute()
Flags SEC-SQL (critical) and recommends parameterized queries

query: Check this repo for hardcoded secrets.
expected_behavior: Detects hardcoded tokens/keys/DB URLs per secret-patterns.md and reports them redacted
Recommends moving to env/secret store and rotating any committed secret
